query:
SELECT 
  status,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) AS total_monthly_cost
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY service_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  status,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) AS total_monthly_cost
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY status
